name: git-status
description: Show git status in compact short format, optionally with branch info, porcelain output, recent commits via --log, or diff summary via --diff.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Optional path to filter status for

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: --short (default), --porcelain for machine-readable, --branch to include branch info, --ignored to show ignored files, --log N to show last N commits before status, --diff to also show git diff --stat for changed files, -C <dir> to change directory

examples.expected:
abc1234 feat: add feature
---
 M src/index.ts

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses git log --oneline + git status --short into one step, and --diff adds git diff --stat to eliminate separate diff steps, saving 1-2 agent steps per review.
